About SNP Blue Metals

Built on Decades
of Rock-Solid Trust

SNP Blue Metals is a premium construction aggregates manufacturer based in Poonamallee Taluk, Korattur B Village, Tamil Nadu. Our plant is equipped with world-class machinery from Sandvik and Hailstone, powered by green energy and certified by the Government of Tamil Nadu's PWD department.

40+ Year Legacy under KPT Blue Metals
SNP Blue Metals carries forward four decades of industry expertise, supplying builders, contractors, and infrastructure projects with the highest quality aggregates available in the region.

📍 Location

32JV+Q2, Melmanambedu,– 602107, Tamil Nadu

✉️ Email

snpbluemetals@gmail.com

⚖️ Certified Weighment

Periodically certified by SCHWING STETTER for accurate weighment

🌱 Green Energy

Manufacturing powered by renewable green energy sources

Why Choose Us

The SNP Advantage

Six reasons why builders and contractors across Tamil Nadu trust SNP Blue Metals for every project.

01
🏛️

PWD-Certified Products

Approved by the Government of Tamil Nadu Public Works Department. Every product meets strict regulatory standards for construction use.

02
⚙️

World-Class Machinery

Our plant is equipped with cutting-edge crushing and screening equipment from industry leaders Sandvik and Hailstone.

Sandvik Hailstone
03
⚖️

Accurate Weighment

Weighment systems periodically certified by SCHWING STETTER — ensuring you receive exactly what you pay for, every time.

SCHWING STETTER Certified
04
🌱

Green Energy Manufacturing

Our plant operates on green energy, reducing environmental impact while maintaining high-output production capacity.

05
💰

Plant-Direct Pricing

We supply directly from our plant — eliminating middlemen and passing the savings to you with highly competitive rates.

06
🏆

40+ Years of Trusted Legacy

Built on the foundation of KPT Blue Metals' four-decade legacy of reliability, quality, and customer satisfaction across Tamil Nadu.

What We Supply

Our Products

PWD-certified, precision-graded aggregates for every stage of modern construction.

Coarse Aggregate

Blue Metal Aggregate

Crushed granite aggregate for concrete, road base and drainage. Consistent grading, silt-free quality.

6mm12mm20mm40mm
Fine Aggregate

Manufactured Sand (M-Sand)

PWD & IS 383 compliant M-Sand. Ideal for concrete and plastering with consistent grading and zero silt.

Concrete GradePlastering Grade
Fine Aggregate

Plastering Sand (P-Sand)

Specially processed P-Sand for smooth, durable plastering finishes. PWD-certified for quality assurance.

Fine GradePWD Certified
